title: kochia tomentosa var. humilis
intro: Kochia tomentosa var. humilis, also known as low growing summer cypress or burning bush, is a shrub-like plant that belongs to the Amaranthaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as treating wounds, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory issues. Kochia tomentosa var. humilis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
